views.name: Lead Intake Form
views.title: Lead Intake Form
views.submit_action_message: We’ve received your inquiry. Our team is reviewing your details. You can expect to hear from us via email within one business day.

field_options.name: Full Name
field_options.description: Please enter your first and last name so we know who we're speaking with.

field_options.name: Email
field_options.description: We’ll use this to send your project summary and follow up on your inquiry. (Work email preferred).

field_options.name: Company Size
field_options.description: This helps us understand the scale of your organization to provide the most relevant case studies and solutions.

field_options.name: Budget Range
field_options.description: Selecting a range helps us align our recommendations with your financial goals and project scope.

field_options.name: Service Interest
field_options.description: Which of our core capabilities are you most interested in exploring right now?

field_options.name: Inquiry Details
field_options.description: Briefly describe your primary goals or any specific challenges you're looking to solve. The more detail, the better we can prepare for our first call.

rows.field_61928: Interested in a custom SaaS solution for project management.
Looking for a basic CRM integration for a small team.
Need enterprise‑level analytics platform with AI capabilities.
Requesting a quote for migration to cloud infrastructure.
Seeking a marketing automation tool with email sequencing.

views.description: Form to add a new Service

views.name: Create Your Team Profile
views.title: New Member Form
views.submit_action_message: Thanks for introducing yourself. We’re excited to learn more about you. One of our team members will personally review your submission and reach out to schedule a brief discovery call. Talk soon!

field_options.name: Name
field_options.description: Enter your full name as you'd like it to appear on lead assignments.

field_options.name: Role
field_options.description: Select your current position (this determines which leads are routed to you).

field_options.name: Workload Limit
field_options.description: Enter the maximum number of active leads you can manage at one time. (This controls your Capacity Score).

views.description: Additional form view for logging interactions
